pi_items.source: Task description in task.json and setup scripts.
setup_task.sh injects these 3 specific email subjects into the Inbox.
verifier.py uses this as the anti-gaming threshold.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a custom tag named 'Audit 2026' and applying it to three specific synthetically generated emails ('Internal Audit Schedule - FY26', 'Compliance Review: Q3 Documentation', and 'Vendor Risk Assessment - Action Required'). A penalty is applied if more than 5 emails are tagged.
